heading: Immunity for good faith conduct
label: 20932 Immunity for good faith conduct
text: The Federal Government, jurisdictions, political subdivisions of jurisdictions, and their agencies, officers, employees, and agents shall be immune from liability for good faith conduct under this subchapter.
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I of , , , known as the Sex Offender Registration and Notification Act. For complete classification of title I to the Code, see Short Title of 2006 Act note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 109–248120 Stat. 590section 10101 of this titleJuly 27, 2006
